backlog.title: Build core platform database schema
backlog.description: Create SQLite database schema using SQLAlchemy. Tables needed: clients (id, name, email, phone), points_balances (id, client_id, program_name, balance, last_updated), award_searches (id, client_id, origin, destination, cabin, status, created_at), booking_pipeline (id, client_id, airline, route, cabin, miles_required, status, created_at). Save models to platform/src/models/models.py. Include a seed script at platform/src/migrations/seed.py that adds 3 sample clients with points balances.

backlog.title: Build FastAPI backend server
backlog.description: Create a FastAPI server at platform/src/api/server.py with these routes: GET /clients, POST /clients, GET /clients/{id}/points, GET /pipeline, POST /pipeline/add, GET /transfer-bonuses. All routes return JSON. Include CORS so the frontend can connect. Run on port 8000.

backlog.title: Build main business dashboard
backlog.description: Build the main District Award Travel dashboard at platform/public/index.html. Must include: 1) Header with company name and live clock 2) Stats row showing total clients, active searches, seats held, bookings completed 3) Booking pipeline table with columns: Client, Route, Cabin, Miles, Status 4) Recent award alerts feed. Dark theme: background #080c10, accent #00ff88, text #e8edf5. Fetch data from localhost:8000 with fallback to mock data.

backlog.title: Build transfer bonus monitor
backlog.description: Build platform/src/automation/transfer_monitor.js. This script checks for credit card transfer bonuses and saves them to tasks/transfer_bonuses.json. Maintain a list of known bonuses with fields: issuer, to_program, bonus_percent, expires_date. Check pages for Amex, Chase, Capital One, Citi using axios and cheerio. If a new bonus is found that was not in the previous run, write it to tasks/alerts.json.
